allow: Bash(sed -i.bak 's/query := fmt.Sprintf\(""SHOW TABLES LIKE ''''%s''''"", mysqlEscape\(name\)\)/query := ""SHOW TABLES LIKE ?""/' internal/adapter/target/mysql.go)
Bash(sed -i 's/row := a.db.QueryRowContext\(ctx, query\)$/row := a.db.QueryRowContext\(ctx, query, name\)/' internal/adapter/target/mysql.go)

Bash(sed -i.bak 's/query := fmt.Sprintf\(""SHOW MEASUREMENTS WHERE \\\\""name\\\\"" = ''''%s''''"", influxEscape\(name\)\)/query := ""SHOW MEASUREMENTS WHERE name = ?""/' internal/adapter/target/influxdb.go)
Bash(sed -i 's/resp, err := a.executeQuery\(ctx, query\)$/resp, err := a.executeQuery\(ctx, query, name\)/' internal/adapter/target/influxdb.go)
